notice: These reusable parameterized templates are adaptations. Their rendered text is not claimed to be byte-equal to any original catalog prompt.

templates.body: Create a single full-body pixel-art character asset: {subject}, centered idle-animation-ready stance, clear feet contact, readable silhouette, transparent background preferred, {style}, no scenery, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. If transparency is unavailable, use a perfectly flat solid {chromaKey} chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation.

templates.description: Reusable isolated monster or creature prompt.
templates.body: Create a single full-body pixel-art monster asset: {subject}, centered idle-animation-ready pose, clear readable silhouette, transparent background preferred, {style}, no scenery, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. If transparency is unavailable, use a perfectly flat solid {chromaKey} chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation.

templates.description: Reusable family-friendly two-head-tall monster girl prompt.
templates.body: Create a single full-body pixel-art character asset: a cute two-head-tall chibi {subject}, compact readable silhouette, centered idle-animation-ready stance, transparent background preferred, crisp 32-bit fantasy RPG pixel-art rendering, family-friendly design, no scenery, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. Keep the entire character fully inside the image with comfortable transparent padding. If transparency is unavailable, use a perfectly flat solid {chromaKey} chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation.

Create a pixel-art game prop asset: {subject}, isolated object, transparent background preferred, crisp readable composition, no scenery, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. If transparency is unavailable, use a perfectly flat solid {chromaKey} chroma-key background with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, or lighting variation.

Create a pixel-art environment tile concept: {subject}, {perspective}, tile edges clearly visible, transparent background outside the tile footprint preferred, no characters, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. If transparency is unavailable, use a perfectly flat solid {chromaKey} chroma-key background outside the tile footprint only.
